links.evidence: SVG renders a generic document/file icon: a page with a folded top-right corner, horizontal lines representing text rows, and a dog-ear fold triangle. Monochrome gray (#666) fill, 16x16 viewBox. Likely used as a favicon, file-type indicator, or UI asset in the portfolio site.

links.description: A 16x16 globe/world icon rendered in gray (#666), showing a sphere with latitude/longitude lines and meridian curves. Typical use: representing international/web/language features in UI.

links.note: Logo is solid black on white background
Logo image contains a circular monogram mark combining R and Q letterforms with a diagonal slash
Logo uses minimal geometric design with clean lines and no decoration
The RQ monogram is expressed through a minimal circular form with diagonal stroke
Logo mark is rendered in bold red/vermillion (#D93025 approximate) on transparent background
Logo visually encodes a stylized R or RQ monogram formed by a semicircle with a diagonal slash
logo_2.png in public/images is a production brand asset for Rômulo Quintanilha portfolio site
The monogram glyph is filled in the brand red color
Dimensions 1600x1800px (portrait aspect ratio), intended for desktop hero section right-side placement per CLAUDE.md art-direction spec.

Photo shows a man (mid-40s, olive skin, short dark hair with slight gray, round dark-framed glasses, short beard) wearing a black long-sleeve top against a pure black background. Centered upper-body composition, frontal gaze, neutral-confident expression. Shot style is editorial/professional portrait, high-contrast color (not grayscale), dark-on-dark aesthetic. Inferred to be Rômulo Quintanilha based on project context.
Default mobile hero portrait variant per CLAUDE.md <picture> art-direction spec (used when no taller phone breakpoint matches)
Portrait photo of the portfolio owner, used as hero image on mobile
Photo is in color (not grayscale in the source file); grayscale filter is applied via CSS as per CLAUDE.md portrait hero spec
Image shows a man with dark curly hair, glasses, and a black shirt against a pure black background — matches the site owner described in CLAUDE.md
Filename encodes 1290x1920 resolution, matching CLAUDE.md spec for tall phones (<768px viewport width, ≥850px height)

links.notes: Art-directed hero image variant for portrait tablets (≥768px) as defined in CLAUDE.md hero layout section; served via <picture> element at this breakpoint
Portrait photo shows a man with glasses and dark clothing against a white background, consistent with a professional headshot of the site owner

links.note: Photo shows a man (Rômulo Quintanilha) in a professional headshot against a plain white background
Used in Hero section (desktop right-side large photo) and Portrait Hero section (mobile full-bleed); grayscale applied via CSS filter per CLAUDE.md
SVG contains the Next.js wordmark logo — the text paths spell out 'NEXT' and 'JS' in the canonical Next.js logotype style
SVG contains a white triangle/chevron shape — the canonical Vercel logo mark — indicating this asset represents the Vercel platform brand

links.evidence: SVG shows a rectangular frame with three small circles in the top-left corner (traffic light dots), a classic browser/OS window chrome UI pattern rendered in gray (#666)

links.note: Favicon uses brand colors (--color-bg-dark #0D0F12 background, --color-text-inverse #F5F4F0 text) matching design tokens, serving as the site's identity mark
SVG contains 'RQ' text rendered as the favicon monogram
The RQ monogram is the primary logo/identity mark for Rômulo Quintanilha's portfolio
